content.question: Whether EU pay conditionality survives an escalation of the rule-of-law dispute between Hungary and the EU, or a government change, is genuinely uncertain and could overturn a key durability anchor.
content.reduction_path: Explicit agreement text and renewal conditions from the EU–Hungary pay conditionality framework; legal opinion on whether rule-of-law withholds can be applied retroactively; post-election political settlement documentation (if applicable).
